troubleshooting.title: Migration Plan Is Empty
troubleshooting.shortdesc: Resolve conditions where planning emits no actions.

troublebody.p: Problem: plan.json contains zero actions and execution does not change package state.
Cause: Discovery may contain no eligible artifacts, plugin emit_actions(...) may return empty lists for all artifacts, or planning input may not carry expected evidence metadata.

ul.li: Inspect planning input artifact count: jq '{main_map, artifact_count: (.artifacts|length)}' build/planning_input.json.
Inspect evidence on candidate artifacts: jq '.artifacts[] | {path, artifact_type, metadata}' build/planning_input.json.
Inspect plugin behavior with plugin info and unit tests for emit_actions(...).
Regenerate plan and verify action count before execution.
